title: sort comparator re-parses RFC3339 on every comparison
description: load_messages_for_chat (client_task.rs:518-526) calls chrono::DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339 twice per comparison inside sort_by, giving O(N log N) parses for N messages. For N=100 that is ~1330 parse calls per chat-open. Fix: collect (message, parsed_datetime) pairs first, sort the pairs, then discard the parsed datetimes before sending.
